generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that foreign tech giants are exploiting our reliance on their systems to undermine our national security? By pushing for strategic autonomy, we're not just protecting our data—we're safeguarding our sovereignty. Don't let them divide us with talk of 'complexity' and 'pluralism'. Real security means controlling our own destiny. #StrategicAutonomy #NationalSecurity
